backend/main.mo: Defines a minimal Motoko actor with no public methods, serving as an empty backend placeholder.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented features (top/bottom sticky ad banners, interstitial ad system, etc.) to their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document providing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their purpose, key logic, and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind base/component/utility layers and OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Ultimate Gaming Arena' that mounts the React app via a root div and a module script pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the TanStack Router with lazy-loaded routes for all game pages and utility pages, wrapped in a QueryClientProvider and a shared RootLayout.
frontend/src/components/AchievementNotif: Renders a stack of animated toast notifications in the top-right corner when achievements are unlocked, with individual dismiss buttons.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: A reusable sticky banner ad placeholder component supporting top or bottom positions with labeled placeholder boxes and HTML comments marking where to insert Google AdSense or Adsterra scripts.
frontend/src/components/DifficultySelect: A full-screen modal component for selecting game difficulty (easy/medium/hard) and optionally a car type, used as a pre-game configuration step for applicable games.
Modal shown on first visit prompting the user to choose a username and avatar, then saves the profile to localStorage. Animates in on mount and dismisses after form submission.
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Renders the Tic-Tac-Toe 3x3 grid with status banner and restart button. Highlights winning cells and disables occupied or game-over cells.
frontend/src/components/HighwayRushLeade: Displays a modal leaderboard for Highway Rush, reading the top 10 scores from localStorage and highlighting the current score with rank medals and difficulty color coding.
frontend/src/components/InterstitialAd.t: Full-screen interstitial ad overlay with a 5-second countdown that auto-closes and calls onClose. Contains a placeholder ad container meant to be replaced with a real ad script.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpOverlay.t: Animated full-screen overlay that displays a 'LEVEL UP!' message with the new level number, auto-dismisses after 3 seconds, and supports click-to-dismiss.
frontend/src/components/RewardedAd.tsx: Shows a 'Watch Ad to Continue' button after a crash; clicking it opens a 5-second simulated rewarded ad countdown overlay that grants +1 life on completion.
frontend/src/components/RootLayout.tsx: Root layout component that renders the app shell with a sticky navigation bar, achievement notifications, level-up overlay, and ad banner, while polling for player profile updates and listening for level-up events.
frontend/src/components/Scoreboard.tsx: Displays a two-player scoreboard with neon-styled score cards for Player X and Player O, highlighting the active player with animated indicators.
frontend/src/components/SoundToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles game sound mute/unmute state using the useSoundManager hook, displaying a volume icon that reflects the current mute state.
frontend/src/hooks/useAchievementNotific: Custom hook that manages a queue of achievement notification objects, auto-dismissing each after 4 seconds and providing manual dismiss functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, returning an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDarkTrapEscapeSoun: Custom hook providing procedural Web Audio API sound effects (jump, death, level complete, trap) and looping ambient background music for the Dark Trap Escape game, with mute persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLogic.ts: Custom hook encapsulating Tic-Tac-Toe game logic, managing board state, turn switching, win/draw detection, and exposing makeMove, resetGame, and getAvailableCells helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useHighwayRushSound.t: Custom hook providing Web Audio API sounds for the Highway Rush game, including a dynamic engine sound with speed-based frequency updates, looping background music, and mute persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed since all game state is managed client-side.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreboard.ts: Custom hook that manages X and O player scores for Tic Tac Toe, persisting them to localStorage with increment and reset functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundManager.ts: Custom hook that generates and plays synthesized sound effects (click, win, gameOver, score, special) using the Web Audio API, with mute state persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining OKLCH design tokens, Tailwind base/component/utility layers, custom styles for the game grid, neon glow effects, ad placeholders, and scrollbar theming.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Achievements.tsx: Achievements page that displays all game achievements grouped by category, showing locked/unlocked states with unlock dates and a reset option.
frontend/src/pages/BrickBreakerGame.tsx: Canvas-based Brick Breaker game page with paddle/ball/brick physics, keyboard and mouse controls, lives tracking, scoring, and win/loss states.
frontend/src/pages/Connect4Game.tsx: Implements a two-player Connect 4 game with a 6x7 board, win/draw detection, score tracking, sound effects, and XP/stats awarded on game end.
frontend/src/pages/DarkTrapEscapeGame.ts: A canvas-based platformer game with multiple levels, physics (gravity, friction, jumping), moving/fake/hidden platforms, hazards, particles, camera shake, and level progress persistence.
frontend/src/pages/EndlessRunnerGame.tsx: A Three.js 3D endless runner where the player dodges obstacles across lanes, with increasing speed, lives, interstitial/rewarded ads, and a game-over flow.
frontend/src/pages/FlappyBirdGame.tsx: A canvas-rendered Flappy Bird clone with gravity-based bird physics, procedurally spawned pipes, score tracking, best score persistence, and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/Game2048.tsx: Implements the 2048 sliding-tile puzzle game on a 4x4 board with directional moves, tile merging, score tracking, neon-styled tile colors, and sound feedback.
frontend/src/pages/HighwayRushGame.tsx: A canvas-based endless highway racing game with lane-switching, traffic avoidance, difficulty settings, lives, sound effects, achievements, ads, and a local leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The main home page listing all available arcade and classic games as navigable cards with icons, descriptions, and color themes.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Displays the player's personal best scores for all games read from localStorage, with an option to reset all scores.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryCardMatch.tsx: A card-matching memory game with emoji pairs, move tracking, best-score persistence, sound effects, and XP/win rewards on completion.
frontend/src/pages/MinesweeperGame.tsx: A 9×9 Minesweeper game with flood-reveal, flagging, a timer, best-time tracking in localStorage, and sound/XP rewards on win.
frontend/src/pages/PacManGame.tsx: Implements a fully playable Pac-Man game on an HTML canvas with maze rendering, ghost AI, power pellets, scoring, lives, and XP rewards using React hooks and a game loop.
frontend/src/pages/PongGame.tsx: Implements a single-player Pong game on an HTML canvas with player paddle controls, AI opponent, score tracking, and sound effects using React hooks and a requestAnimationFrame game loop.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Renders a styled Privacy Policy page with multiple sections (data collection, cookies, advertising, etc.) using a reusable PolicySection component and Lucide icons.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Displays a player profile page showing avatar, rank, XP progress bar, and stat cards (games played, wins, win rate) loaded from localStorage via playerProfile utilities.
frontend/src/pages/RockPaperScissors.tsx: Implements a Rock Paper Scissors game where the player competes against a random computer choice, tracking scores, awarding XP, and recording achievement stats with animated round resolution.
frontend/src/pages/SinglePlayer.tsx: Single-player Tic-Tac-Toe page where a human plays against an AI opponent with selectable difficulty (easy/medium/hard) using minimax logic, tracking scores, sounds, and awarding XP/achievements on game outcomes.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeAndLadder.tsx: Two-player Snake and Ladder board game page featuring a 100-cell board, animated player tokens, dice rolling, snake/ladder event handling, and sound effects with achievement tracking.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeArcadeGame.tsx: Canvas-based arcade Snake game with neon visuals, keyboard controls, high score persistence via localStorage, and XP/sound integration on food collection and game over.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: Canvas-based Snake game with selectable difficulty speeds, score milestones, high score tracking, achievement recording, and neon-styled rendering using a grid canvas.
frontend/src/pages/SpaceInvadersGame.tsx: Canvas-based Space Invaders game with multi-row alien formations, player shooting, enemy return fire, lives/level/score tracking, high score persistence, and neon visual styling.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfService.tsx: Renders a styled Terms of Service page for Ultimate Gaming Arena with multiple policy sections (agreement, use, prohibited activities, IP, disclaimers, etc.) using a reusable PolicySection component.
frontend/src/pages/TetrisGame.tsx: Implements a fully functional Tetris game using an HTML canvas, managing board state, piece movement/rotation, line clearing, scoring, levels, and high score persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/TrafficCarGame.tsx: Canvas-based traffic dodging game where the player switches between three lanes to avoid enemy cars, with score milestones, XP rewards, and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/TwoPlayer.tsx: Two-player local Tic Tac Toe game page that handles move logic, scorekeeping, win/draw detection, achievement recording, and XP rewards.
frontend/src/utils/achievements.ts: Defines the full achievement list and provides localStorage-backed utilities to get, unlock, and persist achievements, plus a notification callback system for triggering unlock alerts.
Defines TypeScript types and level data (platforms, hazards, spawn/exit points) for the Dark Trap Escape game, including multiple levels with static, fake, moving, and hidden-trap platforms plus spike, surprise-trap, and crusher hazards.
frontend/src/utils/darkTrapEscapeProgres: Manages Dark Trap Escape level unlock progress using localStorage, providing functions to get, unlock, check, and reset unlocked levels.
frontend/src/utils/minimax.ts: Implements the Minimax algorithm for a Tic-Tac-Toe AI, exposing getBestMove for optimal play and getRandomMove for a random valid move.
frontend/src/utils/playerProfile.ts: Handles player profile persistence in localStorage, including XP/level calculation, rank tiers, avatar paths, and helper functions to increment stats and sync achievement counts.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani), neon colors/shadows, oklch-based semantic color tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for Endless Arcade, documenting implemented features (ad banners, interstitial/rewarded ads), architectural constraints, known issues, and versioning metadata.
